message.content:
@startuml
title 2. プロフィール編集
participant "お嬢" as User
participant "CABABA" as CABABA
participant "データベース" as DB
participant "LINE" as LINE

frame "登録" {
    User -> CABABA: ログイン画面
    activate CABABA
    CABABA --> User: LINEへリダイレクト
    deactivate CABABA
    User -> LINE: LINEログイン画面
    activate LINE
    LINE --> CABABA: リダイレクト (line_user_id)
    deactivate LINE
    activate CABABA
    CABABA -> DB: INSERT User
    activate DB
    DB --> CABABA
    deactivate DB
    CABABA --> User: プロフィール登録ページ
    deactivate CABABA
    User -> CABABA: プロフィール送信
    activate CABABA
    CABABA -> DB: INSERT HostessProfile
    activate DB
    DB --> CABABA
    deactivate DB
    CABABA --> User: 登録完了画面
    deactivate CABABA
}
@enduml
